name: Naming of the Creatures
oracleText:
Look at the top five cards of your library. You may reveal a creature card and/or a land card from among them and put them into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.
Creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn.
flavorText: "And whatsoever Adam called every living creature, that was the name thereof." — Genesis 2:19
notes: Created from a checked Early World card list item; mechanics pending. Classics theme art uses Joachim Wtewael's "Adam in the Garden of Eden, Naming the Animals" via Wikimedia Commons.
